title: Profile and policy enforcement
outcome: E09.S5 implements deterministic dual-layer policy enforcement between the sealed S4.1 plan and the unavailable S6 executor. Added closed Ontarch policy schema + takogami.agent request policy; strict normalization of current policy/profile shapes; token-aware command matching; git/gh/secret/install/bin/wrapper classifiers; anchored path-scope enforcement; Deny>Gate>Allow merge; AuthorizedExecutionPlan only on dual Allow; exits 5/6 live; production --execute still exits 10 via unavailable seam. No process spawn, state home, command records, or approval transport.
validation: PASS: moon run takogami:build|test|lint|format-check; ontarch:sync|validate (takogami.agent in policies.json + agent blocked-by edge); panoply:gen-check|validate-substrate. Historical ontarch:secrets-scan blocker preserved and excluded.
decisions: Keep SCHEMA_VERSION 0.1.0; PolicyDecision wire variants unchanged; additive data.policy_decision and explanation.policy.
Fixed actor=agent; default deny; Deny > Gate > Allow per layer and globally; Gate fails closed with no approval bypass.
Explicit takogami.agent policy supplies request-layer Allow for lifecycle/report operations without implementing S7 handlers.
Consume PolicyEvaluationInput once; do not reseal or change s4.1-v1 digest; AuthorizedExecutionPlan is the only S6 handoff.
Empty token-prefix remainder matches any argv (program-only allow patterns such as demo-bin).
Remove inline comments after booleans in panoply.agent so the Ontarch TOML reader preserves boolean types.
handoff: E09.S6 must accept AuthorizedExecutionPlan (not a bare SealedExecutionPlan + boolean), persist RuntimeCommandRecord outcomes for allow/deny/gate, implement the real process runner behind the executor trait, and must not recompute policy from mutable registry state or bypass Gate.
blockers: ontarch:secrets-scan detect reports pre-existing age-secret-key in git history (commit a3a4978, 2026-06-24; redacted in HEAD, persists in blob) — not introduced by migration; human decision pending (history rewrite, .gitleaksignore entry, or accept as historical fixture)
token_note: STATE + S5 plan + E09.S5 + S4.1 addendum §§5.6/12 + agent-rails + last 2 session records vs full E09/Plan
